_comment: IFR departure simulation LSZH → LFPG. SID AMIKI1M RW28. Real frequencies from X-Plane Gateway: DEL 121.930, GND 121.905, TWR 118.100, DEP 125.955. Transition alt 7000ft. Callsign SWR123 (Swiss Air Lines).
name: IFR departure — LSZH (Zurich) → LFPG via AMIKI1M, FL350

say.note: 1 — Delivery: clearance request without ATIS → refused
say.text: Zurich Delivery Swiss One Two Three request IFR clearance to Paris Charles de Gaulle

say.note: 2 — Delivery: clearance with information Golf → issued
say.text: Zurich Delivery Swiss One Two Three request IFR clearance to Paris Charles de Gaulle information Golf

say.note: 3 — Delivery: full readback → startup approved, contact Ground 121.905
say.text: Swiss One Two Three cleared to Paris Charles de Gaulle as filed via AMIKI one Mike initial climb seven thousand feet squawk one five two three QNH one zero one three information Golf
Zurich Ground Swiss One Two Three request taxi runway two eight
Swiss One Two Three taxi holding point runway two eight
Zurich Ground Swiss One Two Three holding short runway two eight

say.note: 7 — Tower: holding short → line up and wait
say.text: Zurich Tower Swiss One Two Three holding short runway two eight
Swiss One Two Three ready for departure

say.note: 9 — Takeoff readback is silent (freq handoff fires only when above CTR)
say.text: Swiss One Two Three runway two eight cleared for takeoff

say.note: 10 — Above fallback CTR ceiling (2600 AGL > 2500): handoff fires — contact Zurich Departure
11 — Zurich Departure: initial call → radar contact
say.text: Zurich Departure Swiss One Two Three passing four thousand feet climbing to seven thousand
